item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Monk's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned monk─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level monk to 70 and complete all job quests up through “The Power to Protect.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
